<?php namespace Vonage\Client\Credentials\Handler; use Psr\Http\Message\RequestInterface; use Vonage\Client\Credentials\Container; use Vonage\Client\Credentials\CredentialsInterface; abstract class AbstractHandler implements HandlerInterface { abstract public function __invoke(RequestInterface $request, CredentialsInterface $credentials): RequestInterface; protected function extract(string $class, CredentialsInterface $credentials): CredentialsInterface { if ($credentials instanceof $class) { return $credentials; } if ($credentials instanceof Container) { $creds = $credentials->get($class); if (!is_null($creds)) { return $creds; } } throw new \RuntimeException('Requested auth type not found'); } }
